items.name: Pink Squid Plush Keychain
items.description:
Pink Squid Plush Keychain 🦑💖
Carry a splash of cuteness wherever you go with the Pink Squid Plush Keychain! This adorable keychain features a soft, squishy pink squid design that’s perfect for anyone who loves unique and cute accessories. Whether you’re looking to add a quirky touch to your keys or a fun accessory to your bag, this plush keychain is the perfect way to show off your love for all things cute and squid-themed!

Key Features:

Soft and squishy plush pink squid design

Lightweight and perfect for keychains or bags

Ideal for cute, quirky, or animal-themed outfits

A perfect gift for squid lovers or anyone who loves unique accessories
